title: Fashion Inspiration: 3 Labor Day Looks

content:
Labor Day always signifies the end of Summer vacation. Whether you spend it at a picnic or BBQ with family, hanging out in the city with friends, or lounging on the beach solo, you’ll want your last outfit of the season to be perfect! I came up with three perfect Labor Day looks that will go with any of your events!

Growing up, Labor Day was always my favorite holiday. Our town had a big parade in the morning, a fun fireworks show at night, and lots of activities in the middle. It was a last hurrah for my friends and family to enjoy the Summer before school began in a few days.

I haven’t been to my hometown for Labor Day in years, but Husband and I are going to at least leave the house this year! We’re going to have our own little picnic in the park and see what fun Philly events are happening during the day. I know we’ll have a good time no matter what we do! I have a few different red, white and blue outfits that I rotate throughout the Summer months, so I have my bases covered for the holiday. Here are my shopping picks for your last day of Summer!

Picnic

Tinsel American Flag Shorts: Lord & Taylor

Americana Tank: Target

Red Keds: ModCloth

BCBGeneration Cuff Bracelet: Macy’s

Roxy Straw Hat: Sports Authority

Beach

American Flag Aviator Sunglasses: Target

Red Polka Dot Swimsuit: ModCloth

Yellow Box Sandals: Zappos

Ralph Lauren Beach Tote: Macy’s

Red Daisy Earrings: Katie Crafts

City

Peplum Top: H&M

Red Twill Pants: H&M

Navy Polka Dot Heels: ModCloth

Fossil Clutch: Macy’s

Blue Stone Style & Co. Necklace: Macy’s

What Labor Day look is your favorite? What are your big plans for the last day of Summer?
